title: [kimi-review] 88bd6bb: [SEVERITY: low] The validation only checks value, not type.
description:
Commit: 88bd6bb08
Message: fix(schc): validate window_size > 0 in FragmentReceiver

Finding: [SEVERITY: low] The validation only checks value, not type. A non-integer like `1.5` or `True` passes the check but will likely break downstream window/tile arithmetic (e.g., modulo/indexing) in confusing ways. Consider `if not isinstance(window_size, int) or window_size < 1:` (with a `TypeError` for the
